title: Latest F1 News
description: Don't miss a Formula 1 moment – with the latest news, videos, standings and results. Go behind the scenes and get analysis straight from the paddock.

items.title: PALMER: Antonelli’s Monaco win proved he’s on the path to greatness
items.content: Former Renault F1 driver Jolyon Palmer says what Antonelli is doing is unprecedented – but it's still too early to compare him to the F1 legends of the past.
items.contentSnippet: Former Renault F1 driver Jolyon Palmer says what Antonelli is doing is unprecedented – but it's still too early to compare him to the F1 legends of the past.
items.creator: Formula 1

summaries.zh: 前F1车手帕尔默评价安东内利在摩纳哥的胜利是史无前例的成就，但认为现在将其与过去的F1传奇车手相比较还为时过早。
summaries.en: Former Renault F1 driver Jolyon Palmer has described Antonelli's Monaco victory as an "unprecedented" achievement, placing him on a clear path to greatness. However, Palmer also cautions that it is still too early to draw comparisons between Antonelli and the legendary figures of Formula 1's past. The win marks a significant milestone in the young driver's career.

items.summary: 前F1车手帕尔默评价安东内利在摩纳哥的胜利是史无前例的成就，但认为现在将其与过去的F1传奇车手相比较还为时过早。

items.title: How F1 teams adapted to the unique challenge of Monaco
items.content: The very specific demands of Monte Carlo allowed several teams to devise weird and wonderful looking additional winglets for last weekend’s Monaco Grand Prix.
items.contentSnippet: The very specific demands of Monte Carlo allowed several teams to devise weird and wonderful looking additional winglets for last weekend’s Monaco Grand Prix.
items.creator: Formula 1

summaries.zh: 为应对摩纳哥大奖赛的独特挑战，各F1车队为赛车设计了造型独特的附加翼片，以适应这条街道赛道的特殊要求。
summaries.en: For the Monaco Grand Prix, Formula 1 teams developed and added specialized aerodynamic winglets to their cars. This adaptation was made in response to the circuit's unique and demanding layout, which requires specific car setups distinct from other races on the calendar. The unusual components were a direct engineering solution to the track's tight corners and slow-speed sections.

items.summary: 为应对摩纳哥大奖赛的独特挑战，各F1车队为赛车设计了造型独特的附加翼片，以适应这条街道赛道的特殊要求。

items.title: Williams FP1 outings for Browning in Barcelona and Austria
items.content: Williams reserve driver Luke Browning will drive the team's 2026 F1 challenger at the next two Grands Prix weekends, with the Briton set to compete in Free Practice 1 during events in Barcelona and Austria.
items.contentSnippet: Williams reserve driver Luke Browning will drive the team's 2026 F1 challenger at the next two Grands Prix weekends, with the Briton set to compete in Free Practice 1 during events in Barcelona and Austria.
items.creator: Formula 1

summaries.zh: 威廉姆斯车队宣布，储备车手卢克·布朗宁将在接下来的西班牙和奥地利大奖赛中，驾驶车队的2026款F1赛车参加第一次自由练习赛。
summaries.en: Luke Browning, Williams' reserve driver, will drive the team's 2026 Formula 1 car during Free Practice 1 at the next two Grand Prix events in Barcelona and Austria.

items.summary: 威廉姆斯车队宣布，储备车手卢克·布朗宁将在接下来的西班牙和奥地利大奖赛中，驾驶车队的2026款F1赛车参加第一次自由练习赛。

items.title: Why Perez's 'almost' point shows how far Cadillac have come
items.content: Sergio Perez was so close to scoring a point in Monaco, but his P10 finish was not to be after a post-race penalty for a start infringement.
items.contentSnippet: Sergio Perez was so close to scoring a point in Monaco, but his P10 finish was not to be after a post-race penalty for a start infringement.
items.creator: Formula 1

summaries.zh: 佩雷兹在摩纳哥大奖赛中险些为凯迪拉克车队得分，尽管最终因起步阶段违规受罚而失去第十名成绩。这一“接近得分”的表现，客观上反映出凯迪拉克车队本赛季取得的显著进步。
summaries.en: Sergio Perez narrowly missed scoring a point at the Monaco Grand Prix, finishing 10th on the road. However, a post-race penalty for a start infringement disqualified the result. The incident highlights the competitive progress made by the Cadillac team.

items.summary: 佩雷兹在摩纳哥大奖赛中险些为凯迪拉克车队得分，尽管最终因起步阶段违规受罚而失去第十名成绩。这一“接近得分”的表现，客观上反映出凯迪拉克车队本赛季取得的显著进步。

items.title: Lawson and Lindblad praise 'big turnaround' by Racing Bulls
items.content: Liam Lawson and Arvid Lindblad believe Racing Bulls achieved "a big turnaround" during the Monaco Grand Prix weekend, with the pair scoring points in Sunday's race.
items.contentSnippet: Liam Lawson and Arvid Lindblad believe Racing Bulls achieved "a big turnaround" during the Monaco Grand Prix weekend, with the pair scoring points in Sunday's race.
items.creator: Formula 1

summaries.zh: 车手利亚姆·劳森和阿维德·林德布拉德认为，Racing Bulls车队在摩纳哥大奖赛周末实现了“重大转变”，两人在周日的比赛中均获得积分。
summaries.en: Liam Lawson and Arvid Lindblad stated that Racing Bulls made "a big turnaround" during the Monaco Grand Prix weekend. Their comments came after both drivers successfully scored points in Sunday's race, highlighting the team's significant improvement over the course of the event.

items.summary: 车手利亚姆·劳森和阿维德·林德布拉德认为，Racing Bulls车队在摩纳哥大奖赛周末实现了“重大转变”，两人在周日的比赛中均获得积分。

items.title: Who are the youngest winners of the Monaco Grand Prix?
items.content: After another victory, more Formula 1 records were broken by Kimi Antonelli with his latest success in the Monaco Grand Prix. Amongst several, the Italian became the youngest driver to win on the streets of the Principality, but who did he beat to claim the accolade?
items.contentSnippet: After another victory, more Formula 1 records were broken by Kimi Antonelli with his latest success in the Monaco Grand Prix. Amongst several, the Italian became the youngest driver to win on the streets of the Principality, but who did he beat to claim the accolade?
items.creator: Formula 1

summaries.en: Kimi Antonelli has become the youngest Formula 1 driver to win the Monaco Grand Prix, setting a new record with his latest victory. The Italian driver surpassed all previous competitors to claim this historic accolade. The article focuses on identifying which earlier record-holders he outpaced to achieve this milestone.

items.title: How 'aggressive and ambitious' strategy earned Aston a point
items.content: Aston Martin scored for the first time this season in Monaco, with Fernando Alonso grabbing P10 and the last point on offer at the end of a frantic race.
items.contentSnippet: Aston Martin scored for the first time this season in Monaco, with Fernando Alonso grabbing P10 and the last point on offer at the end of a frantic race.
items.creator: Formula 1

summaries.zh: 阿斯顿·马丁车队在摩纳哥站首次获得本赛季积分，车手费尔南多·阿尔本在激烈比赛中最终以第十名完赛，拿下最后一个积分。
summaries.en: Aston Martin secured their first point of the season at the Monaco Grand Prix. Fernando Alonso achieved a 10th-place finish, claiming the final point available in what was described as a frantic race.

items.summary: 阿斯顿·马丁车队在摩纳哥站首次获得本赛季积分，车手费尔南多·阿尔本在激烈比赛中最终以第十名完赛，拿下最后一个积分。
